pattern: Every zero can always be kept for free, so the task reduces to greedily keeping as many low-order ones as the budget k allows.
hints: A leading zero never increases the numeric value, so it is always safe to keep every zero.
Only the kept ones contribute value, and the cheapest ones to keep are the ones nearest the right end (lowest place values).
Count all zeros into the length, then scan ones from the right, accumulating their place value and stopping once adding another one would exceed k.

edge_inputs.description: mix of zeros and ones under a small budget
budget of one keeps all zeros plus one low one
single one fits exactly in budget
single one too large for budget
all ones, only the lowest few fit

stress.description: random binary string with a random budget
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    s = ''.join(rng.choice('01') for _ in range(n))
    k = rng.randrange(1, 1000000001)
    return [s, k]
stress.note: covers a range of budgets against dense one-strings
